candidates.why: Direct total revenue line; appropriate top-line measure.
Not revenue; operating expense line.
Direct revenue/sales line and more specific operating top-line label.

variables.notes: Using the primary sales line first, with total revenue as fallback because revenue labels may change over time.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs; typical COGS-style line.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost line most consistent with cost of sales.

candidates.why: Personnel-related operating expense, but may include production labor and thus may overlap with COGS in a manufacturing context.
Generic operating overhead bucket; populated and above operating profit.
Potential overhead component, but appears sparse/unclear.
Clear SG&A component.
Same concept as other operating expenses but appears unpopulated/less preferable than the populated lowercase row.
Clear administrative overhead component.
R&D exists but appears below operating profit as supplemental disclosure, so should not be included in XSGA under the placement rule.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected clear overhead component rows above operating profit. Excluded Employee benefits expenses because it may include production labor, excluded R&D because it appears below operating profit as supplemental disclosure, and excluded duplicate/unpopulated subtotal-style alternatives.

candidates.why: Dedicated research and development expense label.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists. It appears below operating profit, so it is mapped to XRD but not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Not preferred; broader/non-interest finance expense.
Broad finance cost line; useful only as fallback if no dedicated interest line is available.
Best dedicated interest expense line.
Another dedicated interest label; likely label variation or subcomponent across periods.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest-related but supplemental and lease-specific; lower priority.
Lease-specific supplemental interest; lower priority.

variables.notes: Priority list uses dedicated interest expense labels first, with broader financial expenses only as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Valuation of non-quoted equity investments Investments
candidates.why: Income statement investment valuation item, not book equity.
Income statement/earnings line, not shareholders' equity.
Equity component only, not total book equity.
Generic total equity line; acceptable fallback but less precise than parent-owner equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred owner-attributable equity to exclude non-controlling interests. Included generic Equity as fallback if label changes across periods.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance-sheet minority interest.
Income statement attribution line, not preferred for balance-sheet minority interest.
Direct balance-sheet NCI line.
Direct balance-sheet minority interest line; label variant.

variables.notes: Selected balance-sheet non-controlling interest labels as priority list. Amounts are zero in preview, but the lines clearly represent MIB.
